facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Big mistake. Rajwadi Zaikah Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is pulling 4.7 stars from 141 reviews and almost nobody on the resort strip knows it exists. Real curries. Real spice. A proper break from seafood overload. If you're craving something different mid-trip, this is the address. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
